pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.3 to 3.4.0 to access newer features and compatibility.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Add Spring Security starter to implement authentication and authorization.
Add MySQL connector to support MySQL database connectivity.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready monitoring and management features.
Add Lombok to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities and services.
Add JSON Web Token libraries for handling JWT creation and validation.
Add Spring Cloud OpenFeign for declarative REST client implementation.
Add Spring Kafka for asynchronous messaging and event-driven architecture.
Add Spring Boot Cache starter to enable caching abstraction.
Add Spring Data Redis to use Redis as a cache or data store.
Add Micrometer Tracing bridge for OpenTelemetry to enable distributed tracing.
Add Logstash Logback encoder for structured JSON logging output.
Add MapStruct for type-safe bean mapping between DTOs and entities.
Add Spring Boot WebSocket starter for real-time communication support.
Configure Maven compiler plugin with annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct integration.
Explicitly set Maven compiler source and target to Java 19, overriding the property-based default.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to .gitignore to exclude generated log files from version control.
